input.note: Apply to raw scaled features BEFORE the hidden layer: int8_value = round(float_value / scale) + zero_point

hidden_layer.note: hidden bias_scale[c] == input_scale * weight_scales_per_output_channel[c] (standard TFLite INT8 convention); ReLU applied post-bias in INT32 accumulator before requantizing to INT8 activation.

output.note: Dequantize final logits: float_value = (int8_value - zero_point) * scale, then argmax/softmax as needed. 0=Healthy, 1=Faulty.
